name: Baked Brie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the brie in half (butterfly it so that you now have two wedges).
2. Place the brie cut side up on a baking sheet.
3. Cut enough red grapes lengthwise to lightly cover the 2 brie wedges. Arrange the grape halves onto the brie, cut side down.
4. Sprinkle generously with brown sugar.
5. Bake at 350°F until the brie becomes soft and starts to melt.
6. Serve with French bread or crackers.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten to follow the specified format, maintain clarity, and ensure consistency in ingredient listing and instructions.
